title: FOOD BOX HOME DELIVERY - 211info
text: SUNSHINE DIVISION FRONT AVENUE FOOD BOX HOME DELIVERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides food boxes via a delivery service. The service is first-come, first-served, and assistance is not guaranteed. Individuals may receive up to two food boxes per month. Currently, no in-person services at this location. 2121 NW Front Avenue Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: -Individuals who are homebound, medically fragile, experiencing transportation issues, or otherwise unable to leave the home -Live within a 10 mile radius of either the Stark Street or Front Avenue location Hours: Registration: Monday until capacity is reached Delivery: Monday and Wednesday mornings Email (503) 300-5738 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 300-5738 Questions Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to request a food box FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: City of Portland TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus 16 Services: Grocery Ordering/Delivery If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SUNSHINE DIVISION FRONT AVENUE
